_comment: Academic Studio package catalog. Served at https://academic-studio.com/packages.json; the app fetches it on startup and in Run Setup, so publishing a package = edit this file + run scripts/make-package.sh + push (GitHub Pages deploys site/**). Entries are declarative data (pip names, sha256-pinned skill tarball, MCP config) — the app never executes shell text from this file. After editing a skill's files under packages/<id>/, bump its version here and re-run scripts/make-package.sh <id>.

packages.label: Finance Data — fetch market & economic data (Yahoo Finance, FRED, SEC EDGAR, Ken French, FinnHub)
packages.manualSteps: Open a terminal and run: pip install yfinance pandas-datareader finnhub-python requests (if you see an 'externally-managed-environment' error, run PIP_BREAK_SYSTEM_PACKAGES=1 pip install … instead) — then download the skill archive from academic-studio.com/packages and unpack it into ~/.claude/skills/finance-data.
